title: Stored quality scores from retort.db
evidence: retort.db: test_coverage=1.0, code_quality=0.833, defect_rate=1.0, idiomatic=0.9, maintainability=0.783
suggestion: All mechanical gates passed; code_quality and maintainability slightly below 1.0 — likely verbose docstring headers on every file

title: Cross-file match deduplication handles overlapping datasets
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/data.clj:248 dedupe-matches collapses identical games from Brasileirao_Matches, novo_campeonato_brasileiro, and BR-Football-Dataset
suggestion: Good design — prevents double-counting when the same Brasileirão match appears in multiple source files

title: State-aware team identity system prevents false merges
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/normalize.clj:85 team-uid disambiguates Atlético-MG from Atlético-GO using state column
suggestion: Addresses a real data quality issue in the Kaggle datasets

title: 10 MCP tools exceed the 5 required capability categories
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/tools.clj:167 tool-defs defines find_matches, matches_between, head_to_head, team_record, find_players, top_players, standings, champion, statistics, list_teams
suggestion: Granular tools like champion and list_teams improve MCP client ergonomics beyond what the spec strictly required
